data.title: Mannatech Announces Notification of Late Filing
data.description: In Flower Mound, Texas, on April 1, 2026, Mannatech, Incorporated disclosed that they submitted a Form 12b-25 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission concerning the delayed submission of their annual report on Form 10-K for 2025. This form grants a 15-day extension for filing the 2025 Form 10-K, originally due on March 31, 2026. Mannatech is listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol MTEX.

data.title: Westport Announces Issuance of Management Cease Trade Order
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 01, 2026, Westport Fuel Systems Inc. ("Westport" or the "Company") revealed that the British Columbia Securities Commission, its main regulator, has enforced a temporary management cease trade order (MCTO) pursuant to National Policy 12-203 – Management Cease Trade Orders ("NP 12-203"). This action was taken against the Company, listed on the TSX under WPRT and on Nasdaq under WPRT, restricting the CEO and CFO from trading in the company’s securities. However, it does not impede other shareholders or investors from trading.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services Announces Completion of Distributed Power Solutions Acquisition
data.description: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. (NYSE: KGS), disclosed the successful finalization of the acquisition of Distributed Power Solutions, LLC ("DPS"), a prominent supplier of comprehensive distributed power generation solutions. The purchase resulted in rebranding the acquired entity as Kodiak Power Solutions, now a segment of Kodiak Gas Services. This move significantly broadens Kodiak's operations from contract compression into the field of distributed power.

data.title: Bithumb delaying IPO to post-2028, CFO cites enhanced accounting policies; IPO originally set for 2025.
data.description: The Chief Financial Officer of Bithumb has stated that the company is enhancing its accounting policies and internal controls in preparation for its initial public offering (IPO). The IPO plans, originally set for 2025, have been delayed.
